description: Create an exploded assembly from 'contact_blocks.FCStd' by organizing 'TopBox' and 'BottomBox' into a group named 'Assembly'. Move 'TopBox' 50 mm in the positive Z direction. Set the 'TopBox' shape color to Red (R=255, G=0, B=0) with 50% transparency and the 'BottomBox' shape color to Blue (R=0, G=0, B=255) with 0% transparency. Save the result to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/exploded_assembly.FCStd.
